courses.title: Constitution of India
courses.description: Master the supreme law of India, fundamental rights, and state policies.

courses.title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS)
courses.description: The new criminal code replacing IPC. Understand offenses and penalties.

courses.title: Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS)
courses.description: Replaces CrPC. Learn criminal procedures and police powers.

courses.title: Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam (BSA)
courses.description: The new Indian Evidence Act. Rules of evidence and admissibility.

courses.title: Right to Information (RTI)
courses.description: Empowering citizens to seek information from public authorities.

courses.title: Consumer Protection Act
courses.description: Protecting consumer rights against unfair trade practices.

courses.title: Property Law (TPA)
courses.description: Transfer of property, real estate rules, and RERA.

courses.title: Employment & Labour Law
courses.description: Rights of workers, labor codes, and employer compliance.

courses.title: Family Law
courses.description: Marriage, divorce, succession, and adoption under various personal laws.

courses.title: Cyber Law & IT Act
courses.description: Digital crimes, data protection, and intermediary liability.

courses.title: Motor Vehicles Act
courses.description: Traffic rules, challans, and accident claims tribunals.

courses.title: POSH Act
courses.description: Prevention of Sexual Harassment at Workplace.

courses.title: Digital Evidence & Forensics
courses.description: Admissibility of electronic records and cyber forensics.

courses.title: Legal Drafting & Procedures
courses.description: How to draft notices, plaints, and petitions in India.
